flashcards.definition: = x, for all x in [−1, 1]. The 'round trip' starting from a value.
= θ only if θ ∈ [−π/2, π/2]. Otherwise, the principal value is returned.
The unique angle in the restricted range that yields the given trig value.
arcsin(sin θ) ≠ θ when θ is outside [−π/2, π/2]; you must find the equivalent angle in range.
